description: Priority 1: AI Predictive Care Engine - Backend migration, controller, and routes for falls prediction and deterioration detection. Analyzes resident data (mobility, medications, incidents, mood, vitals, time of day) to calculate risk scores, generate alerts when thresholds are exceeded, and provide trend data.
steps: Create backend/migrations/006_predictive_care.sql with tables: (a) predictive_risk_scores (id, care_home_id, resident_id, risk_type [falls|deterioration], score 0-100, factors JSONB, generated_at, model_version), (b) predictive_alerts (id, care_home_id, resident_id, alert_type, risk_score, threshold, factors JSONB, status [active|acknowledged|resolved], acknowledged_by, resolved_at, created_at). Add indexes on care_home_id+resident_id.

Create backend/src/controllers/predictiveCare.controller.ts with functions: (1) calculateFallsRisk - queries resident's incidents (falls in last 90 days), medications (sedatives/hypnotics/psychotropics count), mobility_status, age, wellbeing logs (mood, sleep), and recent care notes to compute a weighted risk score 0-100. Store in predictive_risk_scores table. (2) calculateDeteriorationRisk - queries weight trends, fluid intake, food intake, pain scores, mood trends, missed medications to compute deterioration score 0-100. (3) getRiskDashboard - returns all residents with their latest risk scores, sorted by highest risk. (4) getRiskHistory - returns risk score trend for a specific resident over time. (5) getAlerts - returns active predictive alerts. (6) acknowledgeAlert - marks alert as acknowledged. (7) runPredictiveAnalysis - batch-processes all active residents, calculates both risk types, creates alerts when score > 70 threshold. Uses runAiOperation for narrative explanation of high-risk cases.

Register routes in backend/src/routes/index.ts under a new '// -- Predictive Care' section: GET /predictive/dashboard (isManager), GET /predictive/residents/:id/risk (isClinical), GET /predictive/residents/:id/history (isClinical), GET /predictive/alerts (isManager), PATCH /predictive/alerts/:id/acknowledge (isManager), POST /predictive/analyze (isManager) to trigger batch analysis.
Ensure the controller uses the existing runAiOperation from services/ai.service.ts for generating narrative explanations of high-risk cases, following the same pattern as aiInsights.controller.ts.
acceptance_criteria: Migration SQL file exists at backend/migrations/006_predictive_care.sql with proper table definitions and indexes
Backend builds successfully with npm run build
